description: Claude Code usage analytics powered by OpenTelemetry

panels.description: Total cost incurred by Claude Code usage in the selected time range.
panels.title: Total cost

panels.description: Total tokens consumed across all models in the selected time range.
panels.title: Total tokens

panels.description: Number of unique Claude Code sessions in the selected time range.
panels.title: Sessions

panels.description: Number of unique users who have used Claude Code.
panels.title: Active users

panels.description: Cost by model. Bar width adapts to the selected time range.
panels.title: Cost usage

panels.description: API call rate broken down by model.
panels.title: API calls by model

panels.description: Cost distribution across models.
panels.title: Cost by model

panels.description: API request latency percentiles (p50 and p95) over time.

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.5, {service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="api_request" | user_email=~"$member" | model=~"$model" | unwrap duration_ms | __error__="" [$__auto]) by ()  or vector(0)
quantile_over_time(0.95, {service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="api_request" | user_email=~"$member" | model=~"$model" | unwrap duration_ms | __error__="" [$__auto]) by ()  or vector(0)

panels.title: API request latency

panels.title: Cost by team member

panels.title: Terminal type

panels.description: Cost distribution by Claude Code version.
panels.title: Claude Code version

panels.description: Total lines of code changed in the selected time range.
panels.title: Lines of code

panels.description: Total commits made in the selected time range.
panels.title: Commits

panels.description: Total pull requests opened in the selected time range.
panels.title: Pull requests

panels.description: Total active coding time in the selected time range.
panels.title: Active time

panels.description: Lines of code added and removed over time (removed shown as negative).
panels.title: Lines added vs removed

panels.description: Lines of code changed over time broken down by type (added/removed).
panels.title: Lines of code over time

panels.description: Commits over time broken down by team member.
panels.title: Commits over time

panels.description: Pull requests over time broken down by team member.

targets.expr: sum by (user_email) (last_over_time(claude_code_pull_request_count_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member"}[$__interval])) or vector(0)

panels.title: Pull requests over time

panels.description: One row per member: active time, commits, cost per commit, and tokens per commit for the selected time range.

targets.expr: sum by (user_email) (last_over_time(claude_code_active_time_seconds_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member"}[7d])) or vector(0)
sum by (user_email) (last_over_time(claude_code_commit_count_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member"}[7d])) or vector(0)

(sum by (user_email) (increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member"}[$__range])) or (sum by (user_email) (last_over_time(claude_code_commit_count_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member"}[7d])) * 0)) / (clamp_min(sum by (user_email) (increase(claude_code_commit_count_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member"}[$__range])), 1) or (sum by (user_email) (last_over_time(claude_code_commit_count_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member"}[7d])) * 0 + 1))

(sum by (user_email) (increase(claude_code_token_usage_tokens_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member"}[$__range])) or (sum by (user_email) (last_over_time(claude_code_commit_count_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member"}[7d])) * 0)) / (clamp_min(sum by (user_email) (increase(claude_code_commit_count_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member"}[$__range])), 1) or (sum by (user_email) (last_over_time(claude_code_commit_count_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member"}[7d])) * 0 + 1))

panels.title: Productivity by members

panels.description: Ratio of accepted tool decisions in the selected time range.
panels.title: Tool acceptance rate

panels.description: Average tool execution time per tool in the selected time range.

targets.expr: sort_desc(avg by (tool_name) (avg_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="tool_result" | user_email=~"$member" | unwrap duration_ms | __error__="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Avg tool execution time

panels.description: Average cost per API call in the selected time range.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="api_request" | user_email=~"$member" | model=~"$model" | unwrap cost_usd | __error__="" [$__auto]) by ()  or vector(0)

panels.title: Avg cost per API call

panels.description: Cost per model and team member, sorted by highest cost.

targets.expr: sort_desc(sum by (model, user_email) (increase(claude_code_cost_usage_USD_total{job=~"$job", organization_id=~"$organization_id", user_email=~"$member", model=~"$model"}[$__range_s:1m])))

panels.description: Average input, cache read, and output tokens per API request.

targets.expr: avg_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="api_request" | user_email=~"$member" | model=~"$model" | unwrap input_tokens | __error__="" [$__auto]) by ()  or vector(0)
avg_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="api_request" | user_email=~"$member" | model=~"$model" | unwrap cache_read_tokens | __error__="" [$__auto]) by ()  or vector(0)
avg_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name="api_request" | user_email=~"$member" | model=~"$model" | unwrap output_tokens | __error__="" [$__auto]) by ()  or vector(0)
